title: AgBase: a functional genomics resource for agriculture.

S-EPMC1618847 PMC1618847 AgBase: a functional genomics resource for agriculture.

Background

Many agricultural species and their pathogens have sequenced genomes and more are in progress. Agricultural species provide food, fiber, xenotransplant tissues, biopharmaceuticals and biomedical
